description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a neatly landscaped plot, featuring a single-story structure with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior walls are painted a light blue with white trim, and the property is enclosed by a low white wall and a wooden fence at the rear. The front yard includes a paved driveway leading to a covered carport, where a red car is parked, and a small garden area with palm trees and shrubs. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, patio furniture, and additional greenery, creating a private outdoor living space. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story blue bungalow with a flat roof, carport, swimming pool, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a white wall and wooden fence. Large windows and clean lines define its contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport with a red car, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and wooden fence, as well as the blue exterior walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the pool area, and the continuation of the driveway and landscaping.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the garden, trees, and the side entrance, with the carport and pool partially visible.
